workspace.name: Architecture Kosmos Demo Office
notes: Local review-only demo. No external accounts, uploads, costs or production runtime.
Represents KosmoOrbit as future main software for Kosmo and the office workstations.

roles.label: Chef / Owner Admin
roles.description: Full office/product authority: strategy, final approvals, public gates and business-critical decisions.

roles.label: IT / KI Spezialist
roles.description: Infrastructure, local models, connectors, updates, diagnostics and repair.

roles.label: Projektleiter Architekt
roles.description: Project coordination, review decisions, local approvals and delivery oversight.

roles.label: Entwurfsarchitekt
roles.description: Design, variants, references, model development, material and visualization work.

roles.label: Zeichner EFZ
roles.description: Plans, details, layers, corrections, production exports and model maintenance.

roles.label: Praktikant
roles.description: Guided research and simple model/plan assistance with limited write authority.

roles.label: Lehrling
roles.description: Learning mode for school topics, office standards and safe exercises.

roles.label: Schnupperstift
roles.description: Very simple guided access without risky actions.

tools.name: KosmoData
tools.description: Reference library, project knowledge, sources, rights and public-safe data layer.

tools.name: KosmoAsset
tools.description: Reusable assets, materials, textures, exchange profiles and local review evidence.

tools.name: KosmoDesign
tools.description: Main architectural subsoftware for design, model, variants, AR/sketch/speech and spatial work.

tools.name: KosmoPrepare
tools.description: Project brief, competition PDF, site, constraints, program and open questions.

tools.name: KosmoDraw
tools.description: Plan, section, elevation, vector export, layers and drawing production.

tools.name: KosmoViz
tools.description: Cameras, light, material, rendering and AI image variants.

tools.name: KosmoPublish
tools.description: Review pack, layout, report, PDF set, public promotion and delivery exports.

tools.name: KosmoZentrale
tools.description: Local hardware, jobs, memory, approvals, agent router and Kosmo runtime.

gates.description: Sources and origin must be clear before downstream design or public use.
Unknown or private rights remain blocked for public use.
Architectural decisions need human review before local approval.
Geometry, layers, scale and semantic model quality are not proven yet.
No public promotion, upload or shop release without explicit owner approval.
No paid cloud or GPU job may start from this demo workspace.
Secrets, external accounts and private office data stay out of the public repo.
